parameters.content:
## [Utility] Sign Review Token v1.0.0

Single place the rating-link token format lives. Used by [Reviews] Process Completed Lead (sign) and [Reviews] Handle Rating Click (verify).

**Inputs:** action ('sign'|'verify'), client_slug, source_type, source_ref, secret, plus token/payload when verifying
**Sign returns:** { token, payload_b64 }
**Verify returns:** { valid, client_slug, source_type, source_ref } or { valid: false, reason }

Token is valid for 30 days from signing. Payload already carries source_type/source_ref generically so this doesn't change when a CRM trigger adapter is added later.

Note: uses pure JS SHA-256/HMAC implementation — require('crypto') is blocked in n8n's task runner sandbox.
